item.title: To the One That Took My Daughter
item.description: A deeply personal account from a parent reflecting on the loss of their daughter, sharing emotions, memories, and a message of remembrance and resilience.

media:content.media:title: To the One That Took My Daughter
media:content.media:description: A deeply personal account from a parent reflecting on the loss of their daughter, sharing emotions, memories, and a message of remembrance and resilience.

item.title: LordanArts: A case spanning 33 years
item.description: An overview of a decades-long case spanning 33 years, highlighting key developments and the timeline of events as the investigation unfolded.

media:content.media:title: LordanArts: A case spanning 33 years
media:content.media:description: An overview of a decades-long case spanning 33 years, highlighting key developments and the timeline of events as the investigation unfolded.

item.title: Vermont youth facility controversy draws attention
item.description: Reports surrounding a Vermont youth facility have drawn public attention, with officials reviewing concerns and ongoing discussions about conditions and oversight.

media:content.media:title: Vermont youth facility controversy draws attention
media:content.media:description: Reports surrounding a Vermont youth facility have drawn public attention, with officials reviewing concerns and ongoing discussions about conditions and oversight.

item.title: A Difficult Choice and Its Lasting Impact
item.description: A reflection on a challenging decision and its long-term effects, exploring the circumstances and outcomes that followed.

media:content.media:description: A reflection on a challenging decision and its long-term effects, exploring the circumstances and outcomes that followed.
